title: Vast The Realm Of Being Is,
content:
Vast the realm of Being is,
    In the waste one nook is his;
    Whatsoever hap befalls
    In his vision's narrow walls
    He is here to testify.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ralph Waldo Emerson delivers a powerful performance in "Vast The Realm Of Being Is,"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
